summary: Loaded IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md, README.md, numbered intake docs, adrs/, reference/, and 08-source-license-matrix.csv before starting Phase 0 bootstrap.
First raw live turn attempt against codex app-server failed with JSON-RPC -32600: sandbox field was encoded as a map where the stable schema expected a single-key map/string shape.

Retried with stable thread-level read-only sandbox shape. initialize, account/read, model/list, rateLimits/read, thread/start and turn/start all ok; terminal turn/completed observed with status completed. event_count 30, stderr_hash_count 1.
Official Python SDK oracle run raised a JSON serialization error because enum objects returned by the SDK were not directly JSON serializable in the summary writer.

Normalized enum values to their string values before serialization. Rerun of openai-codex oracle (account, models, rate-limit read, thread_start, Thread.run) passed with exact model gpt-5.3-codex-spark confirmed, wall_duration_s 3.713.
Cloned existing PavelLizunov/spark-runner repository (containing only LICENSE) onto build-1 under ~/projects/spark-runner ahead of committing CP1 evidence.

Prepared first PR on branch cp1-evidence-progress to persist MISSION.md, PROGRESS.json, docs/evidence, docs/decisions and CI so CP1 state survives session reset/compaction before CP2 implementation begins.
